title: Parameter-Matched Control Experiments: Isolating PRMP's Predict-Subtract Mechanism on Amazon & F1
summary: Demo notebook running parameter-matched control experiments on Amazon Video Games data to isolate whether PRMP's predict-subtract mechanism provides genuine benefit beyond extra parameters. Trains 5 heterogeneous GNN variants (Standard SAGEConv, PRMP, Wide SAGEConv, AuxMLP, Skip-Residual) with matched parameter counts (~550K) on a review-product-customer graph built from 80 curated examples. Uses full original hyperparameters (128-dim hidden, 2 layers, 80 epochs, 3 seeds). Computes RMSE/MAE/R² metrics and Cohen's d effect sizes, with bar chart visualizations comparing all variants. Runs in ~53 seconds.
